steps.title: Treat the repeated expression as one value
Answer the requested expression
steps.content: Since $u$ was defined as $5-8x$, the value of $5-8x$ is -6.

steps.title: Check in the original equation
steps.content: If $5-8x=-6$, then $10-3(-6)=28$ and $4-4(-6)=28$. Both sides match, so $-6$ is correct.
